---
title: "Caroline Albinia Monro"
---

## Caroline Albinia Monro

**Dates:** (1823/4-1902)

**Maiden name:** (Walker)

### Description

wife of the Rev. Percy Monro, curate then Vicar of Colden Common, keen on poultry and gardening

### Letters

- [To Helena Mary Heathcote, May 5 1898](../letters/3370_To_Helena_Mary_Heathcote.html)
- Letter from Sept 11th [1886]
- Letter from 8th March 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
